历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 759; in 2023, due to a gap, it plummeted to about 11,285 (anomaly); in 2024, it recovered to about 1,126; in 2025, the lowest rank for physics category was about 770. Excluding the gap anomaly in the past three years, it shows a fluctuating recovery trend, with a baseline rank of about 770 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia's science/physics category: 22 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 22 in 2024, 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24, a decrease of 8 from 2025 (a 25% reduction), with a significant reduction in enrollment quota, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 13th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country, with sustained strong appeal to candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct-related public opinion (questionable paper data, etc.), but the university responded promptly. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 29th (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining a medium-to-high level of application attention. In terms of historical admission anomalies, a gap occurred in Ningxia's science category in 2023 (admission line only 412 points), but it has significantly recovered in 2024-2025. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 23 disciplines were rated A- or above, including representative disciplines: Business Administration A+, Ecology A+, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, Basic Medicine A, Pharmacy A, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended in 2026; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be relatively popular. The total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (history category 21,406 + physics category 44,491 = 65,897), with an estimated 44,550 candidates in the physics category, indicating a stable competition base.
7. [Regional Factor] Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; in 2025, it enrolled 12 students in Ningxia (including arts and sciences), accounting for about 2% of the total university enrollment, a very small proportion, making regional preference factors insignificant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 770, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 25% (supply-demand elasticity points to a forward shift in rank), the university's top-tier level continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, the somewhat negative reputation but already recovered, and the basically stable candidate scale, it is expected that the lowest admission rank for the physics category in 2026 will shift forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly eases), with a predicted lowest rank of about 675, and a fluctuation range of 594-756.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range of 594-756, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Mathematics) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Chemistry, Geographical Sciences) as a safety net. If your rank is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<594), you can focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors; if your rank is close to the upper limit of the range (>756), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
